channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Three Juveniles Arrested in Texas Shooting Spree That Injured Four
Massie: Pro-Israel Groups Trying to 'Buy' Kentucky Primary Seat
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie said Sunday that outside money from pro-Israel groups and major Republican donors has turned his Kentucky primary race into what...

item.title: Sen. Brian Jones: Newsom Has a Fraud Problem
item.description: Newsom's guiding governing model since his first foray into public office. Failure upon failure disguised by window dressings as victory and success. ...

item.title: Indicted Comey Says He Has 'Complete Faith' in Judicial System
item.description: Former FBI Director James Comey told NBC's "Meet the Press" Sunday that he has "complete faith" in the U.S. judicial system as he fights federal charg...
